scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields accurately including containers, resources, oci-image, assumes k8s-api. Provides more detail than gold standard but all additions appear valid.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'uid' and 'gid' fields under containers are not documented in the gold standard and may not be valid charmcraft.yaml container fields. 'optional: true/false' on relation definitions is also potentially fabricated as a charmcraft.yaml field (this is a charm metadata concept but the syntax may not be standard). Minor uncertainty rather than clear fabrication.
